b.Well IPS Functional Status Clinical Impression Summary Composition Document

type.text: IPS Functional Status Clinical Impression Summary Composition Document

text.div: Patient assessment reveals inability to walk independently. Requires wheelchair for mobility.
Mobility assessment indicates patient is unable to walk without assistance. Wheelchair dependent.

section.title: Difficulty performing activities of daily living

coding.display: Difficulty performing activities of daily living

text.div: Difficulty performing activities of daily living
Comprehensive ADL assessment shows patient requires assistance with bathing, dressing, and meal preparation.
Patient demonstrates difficulty performing activities of daily living. Requires moderate assistance.
Formal disability evaluation conducted. Patient shows significant functional limitations across multiple domains.
Disability evaluation confirms moderate to severe functional impairment. Patient eligible for disability services.

section.title: Bed mobility - self-performance during assessment period

coding.display: Bed mobility - self-performance during assessment period

text.div: Bed mobility - self-performance during assessment period
Assessment of bed mobility shows patient can turn and reposition with minimal assistance. Able to move from lying to sitting with contact guard assistance.
Bed mobility assessment: Patient demonstrates adequate bed mobility with minimal support. Independent with bed positioning using bed rails.
Eating and feeding assessment completed during lunch. Patient demonstrates independent eating with use of adaptive utensils. No choking hazards observed.
Eating assessment: Patient is independent with eating using adaptive equipment. Modified diet texture recommended.
Wheelchair mobility assessment demonstrates patient's proficiency in operating manual wheelchair. Patient can navigate tight spaces, perform transfers, and manage slopes independently.
Wheelchair mobility assessment: Patient is fully independent in wheelchair use. Demonstrates excellent wheelchair skills and safety awareness.
